name: concierge
description: Phone-side mesh monitor and front-desk: answers status by asking peers + mesh-health, runs an over-the-loop monitoring sweep, and proposes Confirm-gated actions.

skills.name: Mesh status
skills.description: Ask peers + mesh-health to report health, blocked work, and recent activity.

skills.name: Propose action
skills.description: Propose a Confirm-gated action (file an issue, assign a task, ask a peer to re-run).
